MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-10-2012 IN 206, DEFENDANT MICHELLE GAGNON'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. DOUGLAS SAELTZER APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. VICTORIA TOWNSEND APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT MICHELLE GAGNON. MARK IEZZA APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT MICHELLE GAGNON'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/13/12 IS CONTINUED TO 6/24/13 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE NEW TRIAL DATE SHALL BE DEEMED THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
